goals: Explore Polymarket prediction market analysis capabilities to understand what insights can be extracted
Monitor a specific Polymarket market to observe price movements, whale trades, and arbitrage opportunities
Fetch and analyze a user profile to understand trading behavior and performance metrics

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and curious, prefers thorough analysis with supporting data. Likes to understand tool capabilities before applying them to specific research questions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with research methodology and data analysis but does not know specific trading tools or APIs. Asks in natural language about capabilities and results.

end_condition: User has explored the Polymarket analysis tools, observed market monitoring capabilities, and reviewed user profile data. Expresses satisfaction with the information gathered or indicates readiness to apply findings to their research.
